constraints.notes: Q5_K uses 256-value super-blocks; K should be a multiple of 256.

impl.c_declaration: void gemm_nt_q5_k(const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K);

notes: GEMM for Q5_K weights with FP32 activation input. No activation quantization needed. Q5_K: 5-bit super-block quant with nested scales/mins.
